name: Hello
meaning: Raise one hand to forehead and wave outward, like a salute.

name: Thank You
meaning: Touch fingertips to chin, then move hand forward and down.

name: Yes
meaning: Make a fist and bob it up and down like nodding your head.

name: No
meaning: Tap index and middle finger onto thumb twice quickly.

name: I Love You
meaning: Extend pinky, index finger, and thumb simultaneously outward.

name: Please
meaning: Rub flat hand in a circular motion on the chest.

name: Sorry
meaning: Make a fist, rotate it in a circle over your heart.

name: Help
meaning: Place closed fist on open palm and lift both hands up together.
